name: json
title: Extended JSON Functions
description: Additional JSON object functions not available in the built-in set: removeKey, merge

functions.name: removeKey
functions.description: Returns a copy of the object with the specified top-level key removed. Unlike OOTB json.set which sets a key to null (not a true delete), this actually removes the key.

functions.name: merge
functions.description: Shallow-merges two or more objects. Keys from later arguments overwrite earlier ones. Unlike OOTB json.set (single key) and array.merge (array concat), this merges full objects.
